chapter_title.en: Chapter on the State of believers' Children Who Pass Away

text: 4734 - وَ سَأَلَ جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ أَطْفَالِ اَلْأَنْبِيَاءِ عَلَيْهِمُ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَقَالَ "لَيْسُوا كَأَطْفَالِ اَلنَّاسِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4734 - Jameel ibn Darraj asked Abu Abdullah (as) about the children of the prophets (peace be upon them).
Imam (as) replied: "They are not like the children of ordinary people."
